name: L-Town
short_description: Lightweight self-hosted L-Town server exposing a single web port.
description: L-Town is a lightweight, self-hosted server for the L-Town project. It exposes a single network port for web and websocket connections, is easy to deploy via Docker, and is intended for small self-hosted multiplayer/web apps. Configure volumes if you need to persist state.
notes: No persistent volumes configured by default.
Expose port 30300 as shown in the compose file.
